title: ex)situ, LISN
description: Pursuing a PhD to explore and enhance the creation process of interactive systems, from both the designer and the developer sides, and strengthen the collaboration between them. My current project is a collaborative frontend development toolkit grounded in HCI theory.

title: ex)situ, LISN
description: Completed two research internships in the ex)situ research team where I participated in the design and development of a new version of VideoClipper (Mackay et al., 2024), utilizing interaction substrates (Mackay & Beaudouin-Lafon, 2025) to extend the tool’s power of expression. I conducted a user study and interviews.

title: Cre8mania Digital Agency
description: Research internship where I studied different AR modalities and their characteristics, developed image tracking and markerless AR prototypes with various web technologies, and tested them and compared their efficiency and power of expression.
